title: barista grind tree — structured output
description: Top-level document emitted by `barista grind tree --format json`. Encodes the resolved dependency tree as a flat list of entries (mirroring the lockfile's flat structure) plus a reactor-module summary. Each entry carries its `from-path` — the chain of coordinates that brought it into the graph — so consumers can reconstruct parent/child links by joining entries on coordinate string. Coordinate strings use Maven `group:artifact[:version[:classifier[:type]]]` notation.

command.description: Discriminator. Always the literal string `grind-tree` for documents produced by `barista grind tree`.

schema-version.description: Stable monotonic version of this document's shape. v1 ↔ the schema-version 1 document defined here. Breaking changes bump this and require a new `/v2/` schema directory.

reactor.description: Project modules participating in this resolution. For a single-module project this contains one entry; for a multi-module reactor it lists every module in lockfile order.

nodes.description: Flat list of resolved entries in lockfile order. To reconstruct the tree, group by `coords` and link parent → child via `from-path`.

coords.description: Coordinate of this reactor module in `group:artifact` form (version is carried separately).

version.description: Resolved version of this reactor module.

relative-path.description: Path of this module relative to the reactor root. `""` for the root module.

coords.description: Coordinate of this node in `group:artifact` form (version is carried separately).

scope.description: Maven scope of this dependency relative to its nearest reactor module (e.g. `compile`, `runtime`, `test`, `provided`, `import`).

depth.description: Depth in the dependency tree from the owning reactor module (the module itself is depth 0).

from-path.description: Chain of coordinate strings from the owning reactor module to this node, exclusive of the node itself. Empty for direct dependencies (depth 1).
